surface_verification.justification: Framework tooling + CI + compliance-dashboard change (diff-coverage roadmap Phase 1); no UI surface. The 'E2E' is the diff-coverage measurement chain, verified end-to-end locally: the full shared suite (3905 passed, 12 skipped) ran with --cov=shared and produced a combined coverage.xml (79.5% total, repo-relative paths), diff-cover computed a real 92% diff-coverage baseline vs origin/main, measure_diff_coverage.py wrote the gitignored transient, and the compliance dashboard INFO line rendered it. Full compliance suite (921) and at-risk integration tests (23) also green.

behaviors.behavior: measure_diff_coverage parses coverage.xml root line-rate into a total percent (missing/malformed/absent -> None)
measure_diff_coverage parses diff-cover report into a diff percent; zero changed lines -> None (not a misleading 100%)
the tool writes the gitignored transient .shipwright/coverage/diff_coverage.json atomically, creating parents
the tool NEVER creates or mutates the tracked shipwright_test_results.json (boundary probe)
absent-input safe: missing coverage.xml / no changed lines -> status n/a, exit 0
relative --coverage-xml / --diff-cover-json resolve against --project-root, not the process CWD
run_diff_cover subprocess path: parses the report; binary-absent -> None; missing coverage.xml -> None
the CI-gate guard recognizes diff-cover as a gate command and flags a continue-on-error diff-cover step as loose
the informational ci.yml diff-cover step is allowlisted (tracked-debt) so the guard stays green; the live repo passes the guard
dashboard loads the transient (absent / malformed / non-dict all -> None safely)
dashboard INFO line renders ok (percent + tier) / n/a (surfacing the producer note) / absent
behaviors.evidence: TestInfoLine + test_na_surfaces_producer_note + test_na_without_note_has_generic_reason PASSED (2nd is Codex review SHOULD-FIX)

behaviors.behavior: the INFO line is grade-neutral: the Control-Grade rendering is byte-identical regardless of the coverage value, and GradeInputs has no coverage field
the full measurement chain works end-to-end and shows a real baseline (--cov=shared -> combined coverage.xml with repo-relative paths -> diff-cover -> transient -> dashboard)
behaviors.evidence: Empirical baseline run: shared suite 3905 passed, coverage.xml line-rate 0.7943, diff-cover 92.0% of changed lines, transient written, INFO line rendered.

behaviors.behavior: the ci.yml 'Diff coverage' step runs correctly on a real GitHub PR runner (fetch-depth:0 + git fetch origin main + --compare-branch=origin/main)
behaviors.reason: The GitHub Actions runner + PR merge-base ref cannot be reproduced locally; the local run validated the exact diff-cover invocation against origin/main. The F11 Delivery-Watch observes the real CI run on the PR.
